title: lonicera sempervirens var. caroliniana
intro: Lonicera sempervirens var. caroliniana, also known as Carolina honeysuckle or Coral honeysuckle, is a deciduous, climbing vine native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lonicera sempervirens var. caroliniana include its potential to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
